inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q r : NNReal
hr₀ : some r ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) (some r)
hp₀ : p ≠ 0
⊢ q ≠ 0

proof: fun h ↦ hr₀ (by simpa [h] using hpqr.1.symm)
